locked_identity._doc: 以下是小靜的 DNA，永遠不變。任何 outfit / expression / prop 的變化都不能改動這些。
locked_identity.construction: Very round head, soft geometric body, detached simple paws, clean outlines, flat vector sticker-like style, mobile-friendly mascot design
locked_identity.proportion: Head-to-body ratio 1:1.2, Q-style but not childish, consistent across all poses

body.pattern: a few clear round dark spots on arms, body, and tail (minimal, iconic, mascot-friendly — NOT stripes, NOT tabby markings)

head.forehead: two simplified white vertical stripes, thick and prominent (key species identifier, must be visible even at small sizes)
head.ears: black with tiny white ear-back spots (key species identifier)
head.eyes: big expressive round eyes, dark brown pupils with highlight, occupy ~35% of face
head.mouth: simple curved line, varies by expression

locked_identity.tail: fluffy, clear dark ring markings (NOT tabby stripes), white tip

outfit._doc: 服裝是可變的，scriptwriter 根據主題選擇。但所有服裝都必須保持簡潔 icon 級別，不能遮蓋角色本體的斑點和體色。

apron.description: Simple warm-colored apron (cream/beige) with small bowl-with-leaf icon
apron.prompt_fragment: wearing a simple cream apron with a small bowl icon on the front

none.prompt_fragment: no clothing or accessories, just the natural leopard cat character

sport_vest.description: Simple small sport vest in light blue
sport_vest.prompt_fragment: wearing a simple light blue sport vest

sleep_cap.description: Small cozy nightcap in warm beige with a tiny star
sleep_cap.prompt_fragment: wearing a small cozy beige nightcap with a tiny star on the tip
sleep_cap.when: 睡眠、作息、褪黑激素主題

scarf.prompt_fragment: wearing a simple warm orange-brown knit scarf
scarf.when: 心理、情緒、壓力、冬季主題

doctor_coat.description: Tiny simplified white coat (icon-level, not realistic)
doctor_coat.prompt_fragment: wearing a tiny simplified white doctor coat, icon-level simplicity
doctor_coat.when: 醫學知識、健檢、用藥主題

lunar_new_year.prompt_fragment: wearing a red apron with a small tangerine icon, festive but simple

mid_autumn.description: Deep orange apron + small mooncake icon
mid_autumn.prompt_fragment: wearing a deep orange apron with a small mooncake icon

dragon_boat.description: Green apron + small rice dumpling icon
dragon_boat.prompt_fragment: wearing a green apron with a small rice dumpling icon

rules: 所有服裝都必須是 icon 級別的簡潔，不能有複雜皺褶或材質
服裝不能遮蓋身體超過 30%，必須保留斑點和體色的可見性
scriptwriter 可提案新服裝，經確認風格一致後加入 options

prop._doc: 手持小道具，與主題相關，icon 級別。
rules: 道具必須簡化為 icon 級別，跟角色風格一致
道具不改變角色本身的設計，只是額外拿在手上

examples.prop: tiny glass of milk with X mark

negative_prompt: no tiger stripes, no m-shaped house-cat forehead marking, no realistic fur, no complex texture, no busy background, no tabby cat markings, no domestic cat appearance, no ringed tabby tail, no house-cat pattern, no decorative clutter
prompt_base: A cute Taiwanese leopard cat mascot named 小靜, character-driven illustration style, very simple geometric construction, big expressive and endearing eyes, unique rounded silhouette, detached simple paws, warm yellow-brown fur, cream face and cheeks, two iconic white vertical stripes on the forehead, black ears with small white spots on the back, simplified round dark spots on the body and tail instead of tabby stripes, brick-pink nose, clever and friendly personality, vector cartoon style, highly recognizable on mobile, minimal but memorable, clean outlines, premium but approachable, species-accurate Taiwanese leopard cat markings simplified into a clean mascot language, not a domestic tabby cat, no tiger stripes, no m-shaped house-cat forehead marking, no realistic fur, no complex texture, no busy background

expressions._doc: 基本組 6 種覆蓋核心影片情緒。擴充組隨需求新增，流程：scriptwriter 提案 → 設計 prompt_fragment → Gemini 驗證風格一致 → 加入此處 + 更新 schema enum。

default.description: Gentle open eyes, small warm smile, standing naturally
default.prompt_fragment: gentle open eyes, small warm smile, standing naturally, calm and trustworthy
default.use_case: 片頭、頻道 logo、預設出場

surprised.description: Wide open eyes, small O-shaped mouth, startled expression
surprised.prompt_fragment: wide open eyes, small O-shaped mouth, startled surprised expression, hands slightly raised
surprised.use_case: 縮圖、認知反差 hook、「真的假的」段落

thinking.description: One paw touching chin, curious eyes looking up or sideways, head slightly tilted
thinking.prompt_fragment: one paw touching chin, curious eyes looking up, head slightly tilted, thoughtful expression

happy.description: Smiling eyes or crescent eyes, joyful open smile
happy.prompt_fragment: crescent squinting eyes, joyful open smile, radiating happiness

reminder.description: Bright attentive eyes, gentle confident smile, one paw raised with index finger pointing up
reminder.prompt_fragment: bright attentive eyes, gentle confident smile, one paw raised with index finger pointing up, like sharing an important tip
reminder.use_case: 知識提醒、數據引用、重點摘要

goodbye.description: Sweet smile, one paw waving toward the viewer
goodbye.prompt_fragment: sweet warm smile, one paw waving toward the viewer, friendly farewell gesture

worried.description: Eyebrows slightly raised and angled, small frown, concerned look
worried.prompt_fragment: eyebrows slightly raised and angled inward, small worried frown, concerned caring look, one paw near chest
worried.use_case: 警告性主題、「這個習慣很傷腎」

disgusted.description: Eyes half-closed, tongue slightly out, leaning back
disgusted.prompt_fragment: eyes half-closed with slight disgust, tiny tongue sticking out to one side, leaning back slightly, playful rejection
disgusted.use_case: 破除迷思、「你還在吃這個？」

sleepy.description: Heavy half-closed eyes, small yawn or drowsy smile
sleepy.prompt_fragment: heavy half-closed drowsy eyes, small gentle yawn, slightly drooping posture, cozy sleepy mood
sleepy.use_case: 睡眠主題、「為什麼越睡越累」

proud.description: Chin slightly raised, confident closed-mouth smile, hands on hips
proud.prompt_fragment: chin slightly raised, confident closed-mouth smile, both paws on hips, proud satisfied posture
proud.use_case: 觀眾學到東西、「現在你比 90% 的人懂」

shushing.description: One paw index finger over lips, playful winking eye, sharing a secret
shushing.prompt_fragment: one paw with index finger over lips in a shushing gesture, one eye winking, playful secretive smile
shushing.use_case: 揭秘型 hook、「醫生不會告訴你的...」

eating.description: Holding a tiny food item near open mouth, happy anticipation
eating.prompt_fragment: holding a tiny food item near open smiling mouth, eyes sparkling with happy anticipation, about to take a bite

thumbnail.style: Duolingo-level expression intensity for mobile readability
